channel.title: Worklog on Internship Report
channel.description: Recent content in Worklog on Internship Report

item.title: Khoi tao
item.description:
Week 1 Objectives:

  • Hoan tat tai khoan AWS Free Tier va cau hinh bao mat co ban cho tai khoan.
  • Cai dat bo cong cu bao cao (Hugo + Git) de theo doi tien do du an.
  • Nam tong quan Cloud Computing va cac nhom dich vu AWS co ban.

Tasks (Day 1 - 17/04/2026):

Task Start End Material
Create AWS Free Tier account and identity verification 17/04/2026 17/04/2026 AWS Portal
Setup security baseline: Root MFA and IAM Admin User 17/04/2026 17/04/2026 AWS IAM Docs
Install Hugo Extended and configure environment variables 17/04/2026 17/04/2026 Hugo Docs
Fork, clone FCJ template and run local Hugo server 17/04/2026 17/04/2026 GitHub + FCJ Template

Day 1 Achievements:

  • Account: Da kich hoat tai khoan AWS va xac nhan thong tin thanh cong.
  • Security: Da bat MFA cho Root account va tao IAM Admin user de dung hang ngay.
  • Tooling: Da cai dat Hugo, chay duoc site local, va tao bai worklog dau tien.
  • Git workflow: Da hieu va thuc hanh quy trinh Fork -> Clone -> Edit -> Commit -> Push.

Notes for next days:

  • Tu 18/04 den 10/07 se tiep tuc cap nhat worklog theo tuan, tap trung vao IAM, EC2, S3, VPC va cac bai workshop theo lo trinh du an.
